docs:
# Carousel
Animated slide carousel with arrows, dots, and optional autoplay.
## Import
```tsx
import { Carousel } from "@/components/ui/carousel";
```
## Usage
```tsx
"use client";


<Carousel items={[{ id: "1", title: "Slide 1" }, { id: "2", title: "Slide 2" }]} />
```
## Props
- **autoPlay** (boolean) — default: `false`: Auto play
- **interval** (number) — default: `4000`: Interval (ms)
- **triggerLabel** (string): Trigger label
> Requires `"use client"` in the file that renders this component.
Some Aurora UI components use custom Tailwind animations (animate-shimmer, animate-marquee, animate-aurora, etc.). Merge keyframes from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Rydaguy101/aurora-ui/main/tailwind.config.ts into your tailwind.config.
## Install
```bash
npx --yes github:Rydaguy101/aurora-ui add carousel
# or with shadcn CLI (after aurora-ui init):
npx shadcn@latest add @aurora/carousel
```
